The Alzheimer's Association is pleased to announce the launch of the new 
Alzheimer's Microbial Data Sets Center. The Center will provide a central location 
for the exchange of data between researchers and researchers in the field of Alzheimer's 
disease. The Center will be managed by the Center for the Advancement of Alzheimer's 
Disease Research (CADA) and will be located at the University of California, San 
Diego.

The Center will be a resource for researchers, health professionals, and the public to exchange 
information on the causes, risk factors, and treatments for Alzheimer's

owner for several months.  The ISO has been working with the owner to develop a 
solution that would allow the ISO to purchase the plant.  The ISO has been working with 
the owner to develop a solution that would allow the ISO to purchase the plant.

Corners Investments is a multi-family and mixed-use development located in the heart of the
Central Business District. The project consists of approximately 1.5 million
square feet of office, retail, and restaurant space. The project is
completed and under construction.

The project is located at the corner of Westheimer and Louisiana
Boulevard. The project is approximately one block north of the new
Houstonian Hotel and one block south of the new Enron Building.

The project is being developed by Cornerstone Properties, a Houston
based real estate development and management firm. Cornerstone
is also the developer of the new Enron Building.
